title: Chicken Mozzarella Bake (High-Protein Recipe) | Eati
introduction: Chicken Mozzarella Bake is a simple, cheesy high-protein dinner with chicken, marinara, and melted mozzarella. It is easy to portion and ideal for meal prep and Eati logging.

sections.heading: Ingredients
sections.content:
- Chicken
- Marinara (tomato sauce)
- Mozzarella
- Garlic
- Italian seasoning
- Herbs
- Salt and pepper

sections.heading: Instructions
sections.content:
1. Preheat oven to 400F (200C).
2. Season chicken and place in a baking dish.
3. Add marinara and mix with garlic and Italian seasoning.
4. Top with mozzarella and herbs.
5. Bake until chicken is cooked and cheese melts; serve and log in Eati.

sections.heading: Calories, Fat, and Protein (Estimated)
sections.content:
Calories: 395 kcal per serving (estimated)
Fat: 18g
Protein: 50g

Tip: portion cheese carefully if you are watching fat calories.

conclusion: A comfort-style bake that still supports a high-protein fat loss routine. Use Eati to confirm your serving size and macros.
metaDescription: Chicken Mozzarella Bake recipe with estimated calories, fat, and protein. Includes ingredients, instructions, and Eati tracking tips.
